qids.subject: Computer Networks
qids.prose: Consider a simple graph with unit edge costs. Each node in the graph represents a router. Each node maintains a routing table indicating the next hop router to be used to relay a packet to its destination and the cost of the path to the destination through that router. qids.subject: Computer Networks
qids.prose: A group of routers is interconnected in a centralized complete binary tree with a router at each tree node.
